# thoth_evidence_chain (Data Source)

Reads WORM evidence chain records for the tenant.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `from_sequence` (Number) Optional chain sequence cursor. Returns rows with chain_index greater than this value.
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of evidence chain records to return (1-500).

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Evidence chain rows as JSON array.
- `response_json` (String) Full evidence chain response payload as JSON.
- `total` (Number) Total evidence chain records returned.
